works.title: Local Rice Promotion Project
works.description: Contributed to expanding rice sales in target areas by strengthening quality seed supply systems and extension services, improving post-harvest processing facilities, technologies and management capabilities, and promoting local rice sales to urban consumers.

works.title: Zero Emission and Heat Pump Energy Efficiency Promotion Project
works.description: Supporting the strengthening of energy efficiency promotion capacity in Thailand through the development of roadmaps, guidelines, energy efficiency standards, and financial mechanisms for the dissemination of ZEB/ZEH and heat pumps.

works.title: Solid and Plastic Waste Management System and Infrastructures in Lao PDR: Pre-feasibility Study
works.description: Conducted a pre-feasibility study to address the substantial increase in solid waste generation in Laos, where solid waste collection is not undertaken adequately, for building sustainable waste management systems and infrastructures.
